backstory.original: Ishi Snaggletooth hails from a warren of Kobolds living in the sewers under Baldur's Gate. Always the type to be more curious than careful, she accidentally stowed away on a ship headed to Port Nyanzaru. There, she met her dear friend, the Firbolg Littlefox. Often shunned by humans, Ishi hopes to prove herself as a true hero however she can. Ishi's biggest claim to fame is the defeat of the known swordsman, Hershel Von Saberburg, and since that day she's touted herself as a renowned duelist to anyone that'll listen to her.
backstory.display: 伊希·碎齿来自博德之门下水道中的狗头人巢穴。好奇心大于谨慎的她，意外偷渡到了一艘前往南扎路港的船上。在那里她遇到了她亲密的朋友：名叫小狐狸的隐逸巨人。人类经常对伊希避而远之，而她希望通过自己的努力，来证明自己是一个真正的英雄。伊希最出名的成就，就是打败了著名的剑客赫谢尔·冯·赛博伯格。从那天起，她会向任何愿意听她说话的人吹嘘自己是个著名的决斗者。

description.original: Ishi attacks the front-most enemy a quarter second faster than anyone else.
description.display: 伊希会以比任何人都快四分之一秒的速度攻击最前方的敌人。

longDescription.original: Ishi attacks the front-most enemy. She always attacks 0.25 seconds faster than the fastest member of the formation, or every 6 seconds if she is the only Champion
longDescription.display: 伊希攻击最前方的敌人，她总是比阵型中最快的成员还要快 0.25 秒。如果她是唯一的勇士，则每 6 秒发动一次攻击。

description.original: For 30 seconds, Ishi's damage is increased by 100% for each non-human in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
description.display: 阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希的伤害提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠，持续 30 秒。

longDescription.original: For 30 seconds, Ishi's damage is increased by 100% for each non-human in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. The duration extends when Ishi lands the killing blow on a boss.
longDescription.display: 阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希的伤害提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠，持续 30 秒。当伊希秒杀了一个首领，持续时间会延长。

description.original: Ishi's damage is increased for each non-human Champion in the formation.
description.display: 阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希的伤害都会获得提升。

description.original: Ishi increase's the party's gold find for each non-human Champion adjacent to her.
description.display: 伊希每与一位非人类勇士相邻，即提升队伍的金币获得量。

description.desc: Ishi always attacks 0.25 seconds faster than the fastest member of the formation, or every 6 seconds if nobody else is in the formation.
伊希的攻击速度总是比阵型中最快的成员还要快 0.25 秒。如果阵型中没有其他勇士，则她每 6 秒发动一次攻击。
Ishi's damage is increased by $amount% for each non-human in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Ishi's damage is increased by having non-humans in the formation. Stack your formation with other species to buff her!
tipText.display: 阵型中的非人类勇士会提高伊希的伤害。将其他种族的勇士编入阵型，以强化她的力量！

description.desc: Ishi increases the party's gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each non-human Champion, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希会使探险队的金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Ishi increases the party's gold find when she's with lots of non-humans.
tipText.display: 当伊希与很多非人类勇士在一起时，她会增加队伍的金币寻获量。

description.desc: Ishi's damage is increased by $amount% for each Aasimar, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Halfling, and Half-Elf Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`aasimar`) || HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`elf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`half-elf`)

description.desc: 阵型中每有一个神裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、半身人和半精灵勇士，伊希的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`aasimar`) || HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`elf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`half-elf`)

specializationDescription.original: Ishi's damage is increased for each Champion in the formation that comes from a traditional heroic template.
specializationDescription.display: 阵型中每有一位出自传统英雄模板的勇士，伊希的伤害会提高。

description.desc: Ishi's damage is increased by $amount% for each Dragonborn, Goliath, Orc, Tiefling, and Half-Orc Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一个龙裔、巨人、兽人、提夫林和半兽人勇士，伊希的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Ishi's damage is increased for each Champion in the formation that is feared by the old and traditional.
specializationDescription.display: 阵型中每有一位老派传统人士惧怕的勇士，伊希的伤害会提高。

description.desc: Ishi's damage is increased by $amount% for each Champion in the formation that is not a Standard species, stacking multiplicatively. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
阵型中每有一个不是标准种族的勇士，伊希的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。

specializationDescription.original: Ishi's damage is increased for each Champion in the formation that is of a species that is not commonly seen as an adventurer.
specializationDescription.display: 阵型中每有一位冒险中不常见种族的勇士，伊希的伤害会提高。

description.desc: Ishi increases the effect of Let's Find Some Treasure by $amount% for every $(per_seconds___2) seconds it has been since Ishi attacked but did not kill an enemy, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times.
在伊希发动攻击但没有击杀敌人后，每隔 $(per_seconds___2) 秒，伊希会使“寻找宝藏吧”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 次。
Ishi keeps track of the number of attacks she has made in the last minute. She increases her damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each attack, stacking multiplicatively.
伊希会记录她在过去一分钟内攻击的次数。每有一次攻击，她会使她的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.pre: Every day Ishi gains $stacks_per_day Duel To The Death stacks. When Ishi has an available Duel To The Death stack, and gets the killing blow on a boss that drops a loot sack, there is a $amount% chance that she will consume a Duel To The Death stack and claim a piece of that boss's equipment as her own, granting $levels item levels to a piece of her equipment at random. Ishi can store up to $stacks_limit Duel To The Death stacks at once.
每天伊希会获得 $stacks_per_day 层“决斗至死”层数。当伊希有可用的“决斗至死”层数，并且秒杀了一个会掉落战利品口袋的首领时，她有 $amount% 的几率消耗一层“决斗至死”层数，将该首领的一件装备据为己有，并随机赋予她的一件装备 $levels 物品等级。伊希一次最多可以储存 $stacks_limit 层“决斗至死”层数。

description.original: Ishi fights well for an ADVENTURER, not just a kobold!
description.display: 即使作为冒险者而不只是狗头人，伊希的战斗力也很强！

description.original: Ishi never lets go of anything!
description.display: 伊希从不放弃任何事！

description.original: Ishi is a good supporter. Very selfless.
description.display: 伊希是很棒的支援者，非常无私。

description.original: Ishi is an excellent leader!
description.display: 伊希是位卓越的首领！

description.original: You want MORE gold!? Ishi helps!
description.display: 你想要更多金子吗！？伊希可以帮你！

description.original: You like gold? Ishi has gold! Ishi loves sharing!
description.display: 你喜欢黄金？伊希有黄金！伊希喜欢分享！

description.original: A monster is just a friend Ishi hasn't met yet.
description.display: 怪物不过是伊希还没结识的朋友。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Ishi's Monsters Are People Too! ability by $amount%

description.original: Ishi thinks monsters are people too!
description.display: 伊希认为怪物也是人！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Ishi's Monsters Are People Too! ability by $amount%

description.original: We're stronger together! Let's show humans what we can do!
description.display: 团结就是力量！让人类瞧瞧我们的本事吧！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Ishi's Monsters Are People Too! ability by $amount%

description.original: Humans always throw out the best stuff.
description.display: 人类总是把最好的东西丢掉。

description.original: Ishi knows treasure is EVERYWHERE. Ishi knows where to look.
description.display: 伊希知道宝藏无处不在。伊希知道要去哪里找。

description.original: One stab, two stabs, three stabs, four...
description.display: 一刀、两刀、三刀、四……

description.original: Ishi has friends in MANY places. Want to meet them?
description.display: 伊希在很多地方都有朋友。想见见他们吗？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

description.original: Five stabs, six stabs, seven stabs, MORE!
description.display: 五刀、六刀、七刀，再来！

description.original: Ishi believes in the power of friendship. Ishi show you.
description.display: 伊希相信友谊的力量。伊希展示给你看。

description.original: Ishi has MANY friends, and always making more!
description.display: 伊希有很多朋友，而且还一直在结交更多的朋友！

description.original: Ishi is very smart. Ishi reads books. Sometimes.
description.display: 伊希非常聪明。伊希有读书的，有时候会读。

description.original: Blade? Check. Handle? Check. I'm good.
description.display: 刀刃？有。刀柄？有。行，没问题。

description.original: I won it at a game of Three-Dragon Ante.
description.display: 这是我在某次三龙牌局中赢回来的。

description.original: With this rapier, I'll look super awesome and everyone will take me seriously. Right?
description.display: 只要举起这把西洋剑，大家就会被我的凌厉气势所慑服。对吧？

description.original: First in means first to the glory!
description.display: 先出手者得先机！

description.original: See, the air flows right through. It's breezy!
description.display: 瞧，冷风能够通过披风直吹后背。多么的清爽！

description.original: I found it in a bin behind the Yawning Portal.
description.display: 这是我在裂隙传送门后面的垃圾桶里找到的。

description.original: It fits me better this way.
description.display: 这个好像比较合身。

name.display: 赫歇尔·冯·萨伯堡的披肩

description.original: I got lucky when I won this cape, but they don't need to know that!
description.display: 当初我全凭着运气才赢得到这件披肩的，不过这种事没必要告诉大家！

description.original: I look like an adventurer already!
description.display: 整个人顿时有了一股冒险者的气势！

description.original: If I hold my head at this angle, it looks totally normal!
description.display: 只要我的头维持在这个倾斜的角度，那搭配这顶帽子看起来就不会别扭了！

description.original: I want to be flashy, but I don't have enough gold.
description.display: 我想要打扮得精致一点，但是身上的金币不够。

description.original: They'll see me coming when I wear this regal hat!
description.display: 戴上这顶宫廷帽子，肯定会吸引到大家的注意力！

description.original: It's from an old friend. You may have heard of him.
description.display: 这是某位老朋友的，你或许也认识他。

description.original: See, you just have to imagine the RTU between the A and the S. It got ripped.
description.display: 瞧，“阿”跟“斯”之间的那个字你得自己猜。因为被撕破了所以看不见。

description.original: You see, this one time we found a ring. . .
description.display: 这是某次我们发现了一枚戒指......

description.original: I keep this near me, just in case I need to call on Artus Cimber.
description.display: 我一直把它带在身上，以防万一须要向阿图斯·西姆贝尔求助。

description.original: Come on Nub-Ub. He didn't really mean you were dinner tonight.
description.display: 不要怕阿布。他并不是说要把你做成晚餐。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: Doesn't he look fierce!
description.display: 阿布是不是很有气势？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: This is Nub-Ub. It means little pig in Kobold.
description.display: 这位是阿布，它的名字在狗头人语中意味着小猪。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: This mouse is a bit too lucky, even for me. Does he have a higher calling?
description.display: 这老鼠是开了挂吗？难道它是有什么隐藏的身份？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: Rations are better when they are moist.
description.display: 潮湿的干粮更加美味。

description.original: Oh. Sure it's holy. Yep. Just wait till I leave to test it out.
description.display: 噢，很神圣的样子。待会我就尝尝看。

description.original: Don't mind the lint. It adds flavor.
description.display: 不必在意那些棉绒，就当作是为汤加料吧。

description.original: Littlefox likes it, and that's all that matters to me.
description.display: 小狐狸最爱喝了，其他的我都不在乎。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Kobold Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ishi Snaggletooth hails from a warren of Kobolds living in the sewers under Baldur's Gate. Always the type to be more curious than careful, she accidentally stowed away on a ship headed to Port Nyanzaru. There, she met her dear friend, the Firbolg Littlefox. Often shunned by humans, Ishi hopes to prove herself as a true hero however she can. Ishi's biggest claim to fame is the defeat of the known swordsman, Hershel Von Saberburg, and since that day she's touted herself as a renowned duelist to anyone that'll listen to her.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Ishi excels in large groups of non-humans. She increases gold find while doing massive damage herself.

event_upgrades.name: Monsters Are People Too!
event_upgrades.description: Ishi's damage is increased for each non-human Champion in the formation.

event_upgrades.name: Let's Find Some Treasure
event_upgrades.description: Ishi increase's the party's gold find for each non-human Champion adjacent to her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 伊希·碎齿来自博德之门下水道中的狗头人巢穴。好奇心大于谨慎的她，意外偷渡到了一艘前往南扎路港的船上。在那里她遇到了她亲密的朋友：名叫小狐狸的隐逸巨人。人类经常对伊希避而远之，而她希望通过自己的努力，来证明自己是一个真正的英雄。伊希最出名的成就，就是打败了著名的剑客赫谢尔·冯·赛博伯格。从那天起，她会向任何愿意听她说话的人吹嘘自己是个著名的决斗者。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 伊希擅长对付大群的非人类敌人。她在自身输出大量伤害的同时，也会提高金币寻获数量。

event_upgrades.name: 怪物也是人！
event_upgrades.description: 阵型中每有一位非人类勇士，伊希的伤害都会获得提升。

event_upgrades.name: 寻找宝藏吧
event_upgrades.description: 伊希每与一位非人类勇士相邻，即提升队伍的金币获得量。

display.description: 一刀、两刀、三刀、四……

display.name: 谁捡到就是谁的了
display.description: 伊希知道宝藏无处不在。伊希知道要去哪里找。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Ishi's Monsters Are People Too! ability by $amount%

display.name: 要证明的事
display.description: 怪物不过是伊希还没结识的朋友。

effects.description: 伊希“怪物也是人！”技能的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Frugal
original.description: You want MORE gold!? Ishi helps!

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 你想要更多金子吗！？伊希可以帮你！

original.name: Multiversal Allies
original.description: Ishi has friends in MANY places. Want to meet them?

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

display.name: 多元盟友
display.description: 伊希在很多地方都有朋友。想见见他们吗？

effects.description: 阵型中每有一个独特的种族，所有勇士的伤害提高 20%，以加算方式堆叠。

original.name: Flimsy Blade
original.description: Blade? Check. Handle? Check. I'm good.

display.name: 薄弱之刃
display.description: 刀刃？有。刀柄？有。行，没问题。

original.name: Old Rapier
original.description: I won it at a game of Three-Dragon Ante.

display.name: 古老西洋剑
display.description: 这是我在某次三龙牌局中赢回来的。

original.name: Balanced Rapier
original.description: With this rapier, I'll look super awesome and everyone will take me seriously. Right?

display.name: 协调的西洋剑
display.description: 只要举起这把西洋剑，大家就会被我的凌厉气势所慑服。对吧？

original.name: Rapier of the Bold
original.description: First in means first to the glory!

display.name: 勇者的西洋剑
display.description: 先出手者得先机！

original.name: Tattered Cape
original.description: See, the air flows right through. It's breezy!

display.name: 破烂的披肩
display.description: 瞧，冷风能够通过披风直吹后背。多么的清爽！

original.name: Trash Cape
original.description: I found it in a bin behind the Yawning Portal.

display.name: 垃圾披肩
display.description: 这是我在裂隙传送门后面的垃圾桶里找到的。

original.name: Kobold-Sized Cape
original.description: It fits me better this way.

display.name: 狗头人披肩
display.description: 这个好像比较合身。

original.name: Hershel Von Saberburg's Cape
original.description: I got lucky when I won this cape, but they don't need to know that!

display.name: 赫歇尔·冯·萨伯堡的披肩
display.description: 当初我全凭着运气才赢得到这件披肩的，不过这种事没必要告诉大家！

original.name: Moldy Hat
original.description: I look like an adventurer already!

display.name: 发霉的帽子
display.description: 整个人顿时有了一股冒险者的气势！

original.name: Oddly Folded Hat
original.description: If I hold my head at this angle, it looks totally normal!

display.name: 别扭的折叠帽
display.description: 只要我的头维持在这个倾斜的角度，那搭配这顶帽子看起来就不会别扭了！

original.name: Fancy Hat
original.description: I want to be flashy, but I don't have enough gold.

display.name: 华丽的帽子
display.description: 我想要打扮得精致一点，但是身上的金币不够。

original.name: Ishi's Feathered Hat
original.description: They'll see me coming when I wear this regal hat!

display.name: 伊希的羽毛帽子
display.description: 戴上这顶宫廷帽子，肯定会吸引到大家的注意力！

original.name: Stained IOU
original.description: It's from an old friend. You may have heard of him.

display.name: 玷污的欠条
display.description: 这是某位老朋友的，你或许也认识他。

original.name: Ripped IOU
original.description: See, you just have to imagine the RTU between the A and the S. It got ripped.

display.name: 撕破的欠条
display.description: 瞧，“阿”跟“斯”之间的那个字你得自己猜。因为被撕破了所以看不见。

original.name: Official IOU
original.description: You see, this one time we found a ring. . .

display.name: 合法的欠条
display.description: 这是某次我们发现了一枚戒指......

original.name: Fancy IOU
original.description: I keep this near me, just in case I need to call on Artus Cimber.

display.name: 精致的欠条
display.description: 我一直把它带在身上，以防万一须要向阿图斯·西姆贝尔求助。

original.name: Scared Nub-Ub
original.description: Come on Nub-Ub. He didn't really mean you were dinner tonight.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 受惊的阿布
display.description: 不要怕阿布。他并不是说要把你做成晚餐。

effects.description: 使 Ishi 所有专长的效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Cloaked Nub-Ub
original.description: Doesn't he look fierce!

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 披着披肩的阿布
display.description: 阿布是不是很有气势？

effects.description: 使 Ishi 所有专长的效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Nub-Ub
original.description: This is Nub-Ub. It means little pig in Kobold.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 阿布
display.description: 这位是阿布，它的名字在狗头人语中意味着小猪。

effects.description: 使 Ishi 所有专长的效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Nub-Ubtao?
original.description: This mouse is a bit too lucky, even for me. Does he have a higher calling?

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Ishi's Specializations by $amount%.

display.name: 布乌塔欧？
display.description: 这老鼠是开了挂吗？难道它是有什么隐藏的身份？

effects.description: 使 Ishi 所有专长的效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Scraps on a Rag
original.description: Rations are better when they are moist.

display.name: 破布上的食物碎片
display.description: 潮湿的干粮更加美味。

original.name: Dry Holey Pocket Soup
original.description: Oh. Sure it's holy. Yep. Just wait till I leave to test it out.

display.name: 神圣袋中干汤
display.description: 噢，很神圣的样子。待会我就尝尝看。

original.name: Portable Soup Pouch
original.description: Don't mind the lint. It adds flavor.

display.name: 便携式汤包
display.description: 不必在意那些棉绒，就当作是为汤加料吧。

original.name: Pocket Soup
original.description: Littlefox likes it, and that's all that matters to me.

display.name: 袋中汤
display.description: 小狐狸最爱喝了，其他的我都不在乎。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Kobold Champions by $(amount)%
使所有狗头人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
